TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Chuck_Aleksinas, title = Chuck_Aleksinas, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Chuck_Aleksinas} }

S.FORM: Chuck Aleksinas nalecuhan i Litchfield, Connecticut, nanu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, pahanhanan tu kawaw ayza. Chuck Aleksinas i 1982 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 4 ku uwac atu silsil 76, namapili' tu nu Chicago Bulls putiput. 2 bulad 26 demiad, 1959 a mihca, Chuck Aleksinas, miunduay. u Amilika NBA a mimaliay. i 1982 a mihca, mapili' nu Kongniw ciniza.
S.PHON: ¶ńßu ¶k ar~…ĺ…ôksinas nar~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan i r~…ĺit ¶ńßfi…ôr~…ĺd, ¶onn…ô ¶ti ¶ut, nanu sjubaj kanas-mar~…ĺi miunduaj nu amir~…ĺika nba nisakaput, pańßanńßanan tu kawaw ajza. ¶ńßu ¶k ar~…ĺ…ôksinas i **** a mińß ¶an nba sapapir~…ĺi Ē~ ° mimar~…ĺiaj a kawaw, saka * ku uwa ¶ atu sir~…ĺsir~…ĺ **, namapir~…ĺi Ē~ ° tu nu ¶ńßi ¶ago bur~…ĺr~…ĺs putiput. * bur~…ĺad ** d…ômiad, **** a mińß ¶a, ¶ńßu ¶k ar~…ĺ…ôksinas, miunduaj. u amir~…ĺika nba a mimar~…ĺiaj. i **** a mińß ¶a, mapir~…ĺi Ē~ ° nu koŇčniw ¶iniza.
S.FORM: Chuck Aleksinas nalecuhan i Litchfield, Connecticut, nanu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, pahanhanan tu kawaw ayza. Chuck Aleksinas i 1982 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 4 ku uwac atu silsil 76, namapili' tu nu Chicago Bulls putiput. 2 bulad 26 demiad, 1959 a mihca, Chuck Aleksinas, miunduay. u Amilika NBA a mimaliay. i 1982 a mihca, mapili' nu Kongniw ciniza.
